display.purpose: Dashboard titles, page headers, landing hero text.

heading.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, feature card titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, sidebar headings, list item titles.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, badge text, table headers.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Faint separation when tonal layering is insufficient.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary call to action. One per view max.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: #6366F1; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4F46E5; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366F1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: transparent; color: #6366F1; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; border: 1px solid #6366F1; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #6366F1; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366F1; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #0F172A; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6366F1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #F1F5F9; opacity: 0.6; }

components.name: Card
components.html:
Open Tickets

24 tickets awaiting assignment.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-header { border-bottom: 1px solid #E2E8F0; padding-bottom: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #0F172A; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { padding: 0; } .ds-card-text { color: #475569; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Status indicator pill for tickets, projects, and notifications.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-success { background: #E8F5E9; color: #1B5E20; } .ds-badge-pending { background: #FFF3E0; color: #E65100; } .ds-badge-danger { background: #FFEBEE; color: #C62828; } .ds-badge-info { background: #E3F2FD; color: #1565C0; } .ds-badge-primary { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.12); color: #4F46E5; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Sidebar navigation link with active state.
components.html: TicketsProjectsDashboard
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 16px 0; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; color: #475569; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; border-left: 3px solid transparent; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #F8FAFC; color: #0F172A; } .ds-nav-active { color: #6366F1; background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.05); border-left-color: #6366F1; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Skeleton Loading
components.css: .ds-skeleton { padding: 16px; } .ds-skeleton-title { height: 2rem; width: 60%; margin-bottom: 16px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F1F5F9 0%, #E2E8F0 50%, #F1F5F9 100%); background-size: 200% 100%; border-radius: 8px; animation: ds-shimmer 1.5s infinite; } .ds-skeleton-text { height: 1rem; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 8px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F1F5F9 0%, #E2E8F0 50%, #F1F5F9 100%); background-size: 200% 100%; border-radius: 8px; animation: ds-shimmer 1.5s infinite; } @keyframes ds-shimmer { 0% { background-position: 200% 0; } 100% { background-position: -200% 0; } }

narrative.overview: A workspace that feels like a well-organized kitchen — warm but precise, colorful but structured. Every tool has its place, every spice is labeled, and the cook moves with confidence because the mise en place is done. The interface should feel approachable without being casual, serious without being cold. Personality lives in the details — microcopy, transitions, and thoughtful spacing — while the structure follows proven SaaS patterns. This system explicitly rejects the corporate SaaS cliché (generic blue navbars, cookie-cutter dashboards, Bootstrap defaults) and the AI hype aesthetic (purple gradients, brain illustrations, chatbot-first UIs). GERDA is a tool on the bench, not a personality.
keyCharacteristics: Clean hierarchy with generous whitespace, not information density
One accent color (Signal Indigo) used sparingly — its rarity is the point
Personality in copy and details, restraint in layout and color
Tonal layering over shadows for surface distinction

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal Indigo covers ≤15% of any screen. The accent is expensive; spending it everywhere devalues it.

rules.name: The Layering Rule
rules.body: Never put a shadow on an element that already has a background color distinct from its container. Tonal shifts and shadows are alternatives, not complements.

dos: Do use tonal layering for hierarchy: white card on Cloud page, elevated on Mist. Let background color do the work.
Do use Signal Indigo sparingly — one primary action per view, one active nav item per section.
Do keep body text at Stone (#475569) or darker. Never use Cement (#94A3B8) for readable content.
Do use the Masala Kitchen voice in microcopy: specific, warm, mildly unexpected.
Do use skeleton loading for all async content.
Do support dark mode as a first-class experience via [data-theme="dark"].
donts: Don't use gradient backgrounds for decorative purposes.
Don't apply box-shadow to an element that already has a tonal background layer.
Don't use Pill shapes (9999px radius) on cards, buttons, or containers.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent.
Don't ship a generic SaaS cliché.
Don't use all-caps for body text.
